description_long: This is a black ankle boot with a chunky, block heel and a rounded toe, designed for urban wear. The upper is made of a matte, likely synthetic or leather material, with prominent elastic side panels for easy slip-on access. The boot features a pull tab at the back for assistance in putting it on, and the sole is thick with a rugged, lugged tread for improved traction. The stitching is visible along the upper edges and around the elastic panel, indicating reinforced construction. The overall silhouette is sleek yet robust, suitable for both casual and semi-formal urban settings.
description: A black ankle boot with a block heel, elastic side panels, and a rugged sole, designed for urban use. The boot has a matte finish and a pull tab at the back.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elastic panel, block heel, and rounded toe.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the pull tab and the width of the heel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with elastic panel and full heel profile visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rounded toe and the top opening of the boot.
